_comment: Stage 9b TRI_FAN endpoint: split cube edge 0 (v_0 ↔ v_3) at midpoint, then bevel ONLY the half near v_0. The midpoint vm has valence=2 selCount=1 — Blender adds an edge-slide TIP on the non-bev half at distance offset from vm and fans triangles from TIP through the cap-profile samples; the TIP also gets spliced into both incident faces between the bev-side BV and v_3. Vertex positions match Blender exactly, but the two corner triangles at the TIP have reversed winding relative to Blender — winding fix is pending.
